briefdescription.para: Lesser component.
FFT length.
Retarded component.
logical matrix size
Transform both components to the frequency domain.
Transform both components back to the time domain.

memberdef.argsstring: (int bosefermi, double beta, double mu, double h)
memberdef.name: force_equilibrium

briefdescription.para: Enforce thermal equilibrium for the lesser Green's function.

detaileddescription.para: Computes $ G^<(t) $ in thermal equilibrium for either bosons or fermions, using the fluctuation-dissipation relation and the retarded Green's function $ G^R(t) $.

This method performs:
Fourier transform of $ G^R(t) $ to $ G^R(\omega) $ using FFT with step size h (equivalent to integral_transform_to_freq with FFT_TRAPEZ),
Constructs $ G^<(\omega) $ via: \[ G^<(\omega) = \mp 2i\, f(\omega - \mu)\, \mathrm{Im}\, G^R(\omega), \] where $ f(x) = 1 / (e^{\beta x} \pm 1) $ is the Bose-Einstein (+) or Fermi-Dirac (–) distribution,
Inverse FFT to obtain $ G^<(t) $.

parameterdescription.para: Sign indicator: +1 for bosons, -1 for fermions
Time step size used in the FFT

briefdescription.para: Get the lesser component of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ at time index $ t $ (with periodic wrapping) and write to a matrix $ M $: $ M = A^<(t) $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to read from time or frequency array (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Get the retarded component of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ at time index $ t $ (with periodic wrapping) and write to a matrix $ M $: $ M = A^R(t) $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to read from time or frequency array (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Copy constructor.
Constructor.
Increment this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ by another scaled herm_matrix_ness $ B $: $ A^{R,<} \to A^{R,<} + \alpha \cdot B^{R,<} $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to operate on time or frequency arrays (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Compute the frequency-domain Fourier integral of the retarded Green's function.

detaileddescription.para: This function computes the approximate Fourier integral \[G^R(\omega) = \int_0^{T} dt\, e^{i \omega t} G^R(t), \] and \[G^<(\omega) = \int_{-T}^{T} dt\, e^{i \omega t} G^<(t), \] where $ T = (N_{ft}/2- 1) \cdot h $, using either:

listitem.para: a simple discrete approximation if method=FFT_TRAPEZ} (default), and
a cubically corrected Fourier transform if method=FFT_CUBIC, based on Numerical Recipes (Press et al., Chapter 13.9).

detaileddescription.para: The integral is computed for all frequencies $ -(N_{ft}/2-1),\dots,(N_{ft}/2-1) $ , only the Nyqusit point $ N_{ft}/2 $ is set to zero.

parameterdescription.para: Method for calculating the integral transform (FFT_TRAPEZ default)

briefdescription.para: Compute the time-domain Fourier integral of the retarded Green's function.

detaileddescription.para: This function computes the approximate Fourier integral \[G^R(t) = -i\theta(t) \int_{-W}^{W} dw\, e^{-i \omega t} (-1/\pi)*ImG^R(w), \] and \[G^<(t) = \int_{-W}^{W} dw\, e^{-i \omega t} G^<(w)/(2\pi) \] where $ W = (N_{ft}/2 - 1) \cdot d\omega $, and $ d\omega=\pi/(N_{ft}/2 \cdot h) $ , and $ h $ is the timestep, using either:

listitem.para: a simple discrete approximation if method=FFT_TRAPEZ (default), and
a cubically corrected Fourier transform if method=FFT_CUBIC, based on Numerical Recipes (Press et al., Chapter 13.9).

detaileddescription.para:
Only times $ 0,...,(N_{ft}/2-1) $ are set, all others are set to zero
h
timestep
method
Method for calculating the DFT (FFT_TRAPEZ default)

briefdescription.para: Multiply each time/frequency matrix for both ret and les of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ from the left by a complex matrix $ M $: $ A^{R,<}(t) \to M \cdot A^{R,<}(t) $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to apply to time or frequency domain data (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Multiply each time/frequency matrix for both ret and les of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ from the left by the hermitian conjugate of a complex matrix $ M $: $ A^{R,<}(t) \to M^\dagger \cdot A^{R,<}(t) $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to apply to time or frequency domain data (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Access the lesser component.
Const access to the lesser component.
Copy assignment operator.
Import Green's function data from a cntr::herm_matrix at a specific time step.

detaileddescription.para: This method initializes the retarded and lesser components of the Green's function from a cntr::herm_matrix<T> at a given time step tstp. It extracts values $ G^R(t_{\text{stp}}, t_{\text{stp}} - i) $ and $ G^<(t_{\text{stp}}, t_{\text{stp}} - i) $ for all $ i \leq \min(t_{\text{stp}}, N_{\text{ft}} / 2 - 1) $, and stores them in the time-domain representation of this ness2::herm_matrix_ness object.
The lesser component is symmetrized to enforce Hermitian structure: $ G^<(-t) = -[G^<(t)]^\dagger $.

parameterdescription.para: Scalar type of the input matrix (e.g., std::complex<double>).
The source Green's function in cntr::herm_matrix<T> format.
The reference time step (must satisfy $ {\tt tstp} \leq \tt Gcntr.nt() $).
If matrix dimensions mismatch or tstp is out of range.

briefdescription.para: Read Green's function data from a given hdf5 file and group.

detaileddescription.para: Opens the desired hdf5 file, reads the ret_, les_, Nft and size data from the specified group into the herm_matrix_ness object and closes the file.

parameterdescription.para: FFTW planning flag to use if resizing (default: FFTW_ESTIMATE).

briefdescription.para: Helper function: Read from a named subgroup under the given hdf5 group.

detaileddescription.para: Opens the specified subgroup, reads the object, and closes the subgroup.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the subgroup to open.
FFTW planning flag to use if resizing (default: FFTW_ESTIMATE).

briefdescription.para: Helper function: Read the herm_matrix_ness data (ret and les components) from an hdf5 group.

detaileddescription.para: If the stored dimensions differ from the current object, automatically resizes the object using the provided FFTW_FLAG.

parameterdescription.para: FFTW planning flag to use if resizing (default: FFTW_ESTIMATE).

briefdescription.para: Access the retarded component.
Const access to the retarded component.
Multiply each time/frequency matrix for both ret and les of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ from the right by a complex matrix $ M $: $ A^{R,<}(t) \to A^{R,<}(t) \cdot M $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to apply to time or frequency domain data (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Multiply each time/frequency matrix for both ret and les of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ from the right by the hermitian conjugate of a complex matrix $ M $: $ A^{R,<}(t) \to A^{R,<}(t) \cdot M^\dagger $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to apply to time or frequency domain data (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Set the lesser component of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ at time index $ t $ (with periodic wrapping) from a matrix $ M $: $ A^<(t) = M $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to apply to time or frequency array (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

memberdef.argsstring: (int i1, int i2, const herm_matrix_ness &B, int j1, int j2, fft_domain type)
memberdef.name: set_matrixelement

briefdescription.para: Set one matrix element (both ret and les) of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ from another herm_matrix_ness $ B $.

detaileddescription.para: This sets $ A^{R,<}(i_1, i_2)(t) = B^{R,<}(j_1, j_2)(t) $ across all times or frequencies.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to operate on time or frequency arrays (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Set the retarded component of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ at time index $ t $ (with periodic wrapping) from a matrix $ M $: $ A^R(t) = M $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to apply to time or frequency array (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Set all elements of both ret and les to zero.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to clear time or frequency arrays (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Scale both ret and les of this herm_matrix_ness $ A $ in-place by a complex scalar: $ A^{R,<} \to \alpha \cdot A^{R,<} $.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to operate on time or frequency arrays (fft_domain::time or fft_domain::freq).

briefdescription.para: Write Green's function to a hdf5 file under the given group name.

detaileddescription.para: Opens or creates the hdf5 file if not exisitng, writes theret_, les_, Nft and size data of the herm_matrix_ness under the specified group name and closes the file.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the top-level group to create.

briefdescription.para: Print the Green's function (ret and les, time and frequency) to a text file.

detaileddescription.para:
Outputs:
Header line: # Nft size1 `precision
Blocks for ret_time, les_time, ret_freq, les_freq
Read the Green's function data from a text file.
Expects the same format as produced by print_to_file. Resizes internal arrays if needed using the provided FFTW_FLAG.

filename
Path to the text file.
FFTW_FLAG
FFTW planning flag to use if resizing (default: `FFTW_ESTIMATE). */ void read_from_file(const std::string& filename, unsigned FFTW_FLAG = FFTW_ESTIMATE);
#if CNTR_USE_HDF5 == 1
Helper function: Write the herm_matrix_ness data (ret and les components) to an hdf5 group.
Stores attributes for Nft_ and size1_ and delegates writing to the internal fft_array instances (ret_ and les_).

briefdescription.para: Helper function: Write to a named subgroup under the given hdf5 group.

detaileddescription.para: Creates a subgroup named groupname, writes this object into it, and closes it.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the subgroup to create.

briefdescription.para: Destructor.
Class representing a two-component Green's function: retarded (ret) and lesser (les). Each component is an fft_array of size (Nft) × (size1_ × size1_).
